decks.notes: This Mono Black Aggro deck focuses on utilizing low-cost creatures and disruptive spells to quickly overwhelm the opponent and control the board. By efficiently deploying threats like Dauthi Voidwalker, Nethergoyf, and Stalactite Stalker, and disrupting the opponent's game plan with cards like Thoughtseize, Daze, and Wasteland, this deck aims to establish early dominance and apply constant pressure. The inclusion of cards like Dark Ritual and Urza's Bauble also allows for explosive plays and card advantage, ensuring the deck maintains momentum throughout the game.

The deck revolves around quickly getting big payoff creatures like Emrakul, Griselbrand or Atraxa onto the battlefield for free using the powerful spells Show and Tell or Sneak Attack. The deck includes a variety of counterspells and cantrips to protect and find the combo pieces. With the ability to cheat out huge threats ahead of schedule, the deck aims to overwhelm the opponent before they have a chance to respond, utilizing its mana acceleration and powerful creatures to win the game swiftly.

This deck is focused on playing powerful creatures like Atraxa, Grand Unifier and Acererak the Archlich for free by utilizing the combo of Aluren and Show and Tell. By casting Aluren, players can put their creatures into play without paying their mana costs, ensuring a quick and powerful board presence. Additionally, cards like Omniscience and Emrakul, the Aeons Torn provide extra win conditions for the deck. The deck also includes essential control elements like Force of Will and Brainstorm to protect the combo and ensure consistency in drawing the necessary pieces.

The main concept of this deck is to quickly assemble the Painter's Servant and Grindstone combo to mill the opponent's deck. The deck includes various cards like Goblin Welder and Goblin Engineer to help put the combo pieces together, along with disruptive spells like Pyroblast to protect the combo. Urza's Saga and Mox Opal provide additional mana acceleration, while cards like Agatha's Soul Cauldron and Soul-Guide Lantern offer supplementary utility. The synergy between artifacts and cards like Chaos Defiler and Legion Extruder helps the deck to control the board while setting up for the combo win condition.

The deck focuses on aggressive early creature plays combined with disruptive elements to control the opponent's game plan. By utilizing cards like Stoneforge Mystic to fetch powerful equipment, Wasteland to disrupt mana bases, and Thoughtseize to strip key cards from the opponent's hand, the deck aims to apply pressure while disrupting the opponent's strategy. The inclusion of powerful threats like Dark Depths and Overlord of the Balemurk provide additional win conditions, making it difficult for opponents to stabilize. With a mix of disruption and aggressive creatures, the deck aims to quickly close out games against slower opponents.

The primary strategy of this deck focuses on using cards that enable the player to quickly fill their graveyard with key creatures like Golgari Grave-Troll and Narcomoeba. By utilizing cards like Faithless Looting and Breakthrough to dump cards into the graveyard, the player can then use cards like Dread Return to bring back powerful creatures from the graveyard and overwhelm their opponent. The deck also includes disruption cards like Cabal Therapy to disrupt opponent's strategies. Overall, the deck aims to quickly assemble its combo pieces and overwhelm the opponent with a surge of creatures from the graveyard.

The deck focuses on aggressive creature strategies using Aether Vial to cheat creatures into play quickly. Utilizing a mix of disruptive creatures like Meddling Mage and Lavinia, Azorius Renegade, along with powerful threats like Overlord of the Balemurk and Phelia, Exuberant Shepherd, the deck aims to establish a board presence early and pressure the opponent. Additionally, the inclusion of Yorion, Sky Nomad as a companion allows for extra value and flexibility in longer games. The deck also includes various control elements like Force of Will and Swords to Plowshares to disrupt the opponent's game plan.

The deck focuses on utilizing lands as a resource to control the game. By continuously recurring lands with cards like Life from the Loam and utilizing lands with powerful abilities like Bojuka Bog and Karakas, the deck aims to disrupt opponents while building up its own resources. The key strategy involves creating a lock on the board by combining lands like Dark Depths and Thespian's Stage to create a powerful token, while also using cards like Sphere of Resistance and Wasteland to slow down the opponent's game plan. The deck aims to establish dominance through control and resource denial.

The deck focuses on using card advantage and counterspells to control the game, while also using removal spells to handle threats. It aims to draw into its powerful planeswalkers like Tamiyo and Teferi, which can help provide additional card advantage and disruption. The deck also includes ramp spells like Up the Beanstalk to help accelerate its mana development. With a mix of efficient removal, counterspells, and powerful planeswalkers, the deck looks to outvalue and outmaneuver opponents in a slower, grindy game.

This Legacy Combo - Storm deck focuses on quickly assembling the necessary cards to generate a massive storm count and cast Tendrils of Agony for lethal damage. The deck utilizes tools like Infernal Tutor, Burning Wish, and Lion's Eye Diamond to search for and play key combo pieces, while Thoughtseize and Duress help to disrupt the opponent's strategy. By efficiently ramping mana with cards like Dark Ritual and Lotus Petal, this deck aims to win the game in a single explosive turn.

The main concept of this deck is to quickly and efficiently assemble all necessary combo pieces to win the game in a single turn. By utilizing cards like Dark Ritual, Lotus Petal, and Simian Spirit Guide, the deck aims to play out its entire hand of spells in quick succession, ultimately leading to a game-winning sequence such as casting Balustrade Spy to mill the entire library and then using Thassa's Oracle with no cards left in the deck to win the game instantly. The deck is centered around a high-risk, high-reward strategy that requires precise sequencing and timing to pull off successfully.

The deck aims to quickly and efficiently dump the entire library into the graveyard to win the game with Thassa's Oracle or other win conditions. It utilizes a combination of mana acceleration, graveyard manipulation, and protection spells to execute the combo as quickly as possible while disrupting the opponent's game plan. The strategy revolves around casting spells for minimal cost and taking advantage of various synergies to achieve a decisive victory before the opponent can react. The deck requires careful planning and timing to successfully combo off and win the game.

This deck focuses on using efficient removal spells and disruptive spells like Thoughtseize and Force of Will to control the game and protect its threats. Murktide Regent and Barrowgoyf provide a quick clock for the opponent, while Tamiyo, Inquisitive Student helps filter through the deck and generate card advantage. The deck also utilizes tempo plays with cards like Daze and Brazen Borrower to disrupt the opponent's game plan. Overall, the deck aims to disrupt the opponent's strategy while applying pressure with its threats to secure the win.

The deck focuses on utilizing various cards to control the game and disrupt the opponent's strategy. It includes a mix of creatures, spells, and lands to maintain board presence and counter any threats. The deck utilizes powerful control cards like Force of Will, Thoughtseize, and Wasteland to disrupt the opponent's game plan while also establishing its own win conditions with cards like Uro, Titan of Nature's Wrath and Kaito, Bane of Nightmares. The goal is to outvalue the opponent and control the game until achieving victory.

The main concept of this combo deck is to use cards like Show and Tell and Sneak Attack to put powerful creatures like Emrakul, the Aeons Torn and Atraxa, Grand Unifier onto the battlefield quickly. This allows the player to overwhelm the opponent with big threats and close out the game before the opponent can properly respond. The deck also includes cards like Force of Will and Veil of Summer for protection and disruption, as well as mana acceleration with Lotus Petal and Ancient Tomb to power out the combo pieces.

This deck focuses on disrupting the opponent's game plan while applying pressure with efficient creatures and spells. By utilizing cards like Force of Will, Thoughtseize, and Daze, the deck aims to control the game tempo and protect its threats. Cards like Fatal Push and Baleful Strix provide efficient removal and blockers, while Tamiyo, Inquisitive Student and Murktide Regent offer powerful win conditions. The deck aims to disrupt the opponent's resources and quickly close out the game with a combination of aggression and disruption.
